title: Kerala High Court refuses to quash ED probe into CMRL case involving former CM's daughter
description: The Kerala High Court on Tuesday refused to quash the Enforcement Directorate's (ED's) investigation into Cochin Minerals and Rutile Limited (CMRL) [M/S Cochin Minerals and Rutile Limited & Ors. v. Directorate of Enforcement]Justice TR Ravi passed the verdict on a batch of pleas filed by CMRL and its officials.Justice TR RaviCMRL, a public limited company based in Kerala and engaged in the manufacture of synthetic rutile and other industrial chemicals, has been under the scanner of the ED fo
